title: verbascum × adulterinum subsp. seminigrum
intro: Verbascum × adulterinum subsp. seminigrum, a subspecies of the Verbascum × adulterinum hybrid, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is a medicinal plant with properties that have been used to treat various health conditions, including coughs and respiratory issues. The plant has been traditionally used for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve congestion and soothe irritated tissues. In herbal preparations, Verbascum × adulterinum subsp. seminigrum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to treat colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory infections.
